zh.Thrumpton Hall, Nottingham, Nottingham,: 英國諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆
zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell於1165年出生。她於1180年與Richard Powtrell在英國諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Thrumpton Hall, Nottingham, Nottingham,: 英国諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell于1165年出生。她于1180年与Richard Powtrell在英国諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Powtrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Powdrill
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Nottinghamshire; of Norman origin): nickname from Anglo-Norman French poutrel, putrel ‘colt, horse’ (medieval Latin pultrellus), probably denoting one of a lively or frisky disposition.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell was born in 1165. She married Richard Powtrell in 1180, in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell est née en 1165. Elle a épousé Richard Powtrell en 1180, à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell wurde 1165 geboren. Sie hat 1180 in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England Richard Powtrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell è nata il nel 1165. Lei sposato Richard Powtrell nel 1180, nel Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Thrumpton Hall, Nottingham, Nottingham,: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガム
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrellは1165年に生まれた。1180年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムでRichard Powtrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell(은)는 1165년 태어났다. 그녀는 1180년 영국 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에서 Richard Powtrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell nasceu em 1165. Ela casou-se com Richard Powtrell em 1180, em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell родилась в 1165 г. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Powtrell в 1180 г. в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell nació en 1165. Se casó con Richard Powtrell en 1180, en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
